mechanics.excerpt: It reduces the firing noise and muzzie flash any slug-throwing pistol, rifle SMG sucn that Perception Checks have +4 TN Modifier to detect the fring However; common silencer becomes useless after repeated use; if character rolls fumble while using silencer; ceas function silencer adds barrel length. making the weapon more difficult to conceal: apply ~2 TN Modifier t0 the Perception Check of any character trying spot concealed weapon with silencer attached. The silencer can be carried separately ad attached in combat; which Complex Action.
